author: y4rr
content: Conformance tests added in ferrotorch-jit/tests/conformance_jit_error_variants.rs (Sprint A.4). GpuBackendUnavailable fires unconditionally from InductorBackend::compile() with GpuCuda/GpuPtx targets — no physical GPU required; the error surfaces because no runtime executor is wired through the JIT path. Added: Display + From<JitError> tests (2 tests), InductorBackend::compile() with GpuCuda and GpuPtx each returning the error (2 tests), opt-in CPU fallback pattern demonstration (1 test), #[cfg(feature='cuda')] path showing runtime-layer rejection after NVRTC succeeds (1 test), #[cfg(not(feature='cuda'))] path showing codegen-layer Unsupported rejection (1 test) — 7 tests total for this issue. _surface_exclusions.toml updated: reason changed from 'live-env' to 'implicit' with notes. cargo test -p ferrotorch-jit --tests clean (541 tests); cargo clippy -p ferrotorch-jit --all-targets -- -D warnings clean.
